opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My stomach is tied in knots, I can't leave the toilet, and I'm so exhausted I feel faint.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It flared last night — agonising cramps and explosive diarrhoea, and now I feel faint standing; I'm on my own.

symptom_narrative.character: cramping 'knots', explosive watery diarrhoea, and even sipping water triggers spasms
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: agony; I feel faint and drained
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: a flare of my chronic gut problem since food poisoning 6 months ago
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: presyncope on standing, exhaustion, and I can't keep fluids down
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had post-food-poisoning IBS/mast cell flares before, but this is severe

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: post-infectious IBS with mast cell reactivity (since food poisoning 6 months ago)

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: tried loperamide but vomited it straight back

family_history_as_reported.narrative: nothing specific that I know of

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I live alone, feel faint standing, and can't keep water down

communication_style.typical_message_style: describes cramps, diarrhoea and faintness clearly, in obvious discomfort

objective_data_offered.value: my belly is bloated but soft; explosive watery diarrhoea, no blood seen
my mouth is dry, I feel faint standing, and my heart is racing
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: symptoms of dehydration; BP can't be measured over chat
